$comment: Design token file for the System Alert component
$description: Full-width banner alert anchored to the top or bottom of the mobile viewport (393px wide). Used for system-level status messages such as connectivity, success confirmations, warnings, and errors. Two priority levels: High (solid filled background, white/near-white text — maximum urgency) and Medium (light tinted background, semantic-colour text — passive status). Two variants: Default (trailing x-close dismiss icon) and Action (trailing chevron-right navigate icon). Subtext is optional. Five semantic states: Primary, Warning, Success, Error, Neutral. Note: Error Medium uses the warning/700 colour token for title and subtext text — this is faithfully captured from the Figma source.

typography.description: 12px Regular, 17px line-height — optional supporting detail text, truncated to available width

default.description: GHL icon name for the dismiss button in the Default variant

action.description: GHL icon name for the navigate/action button in the Action variant
